agency: Immigration Services Agency (出入国在留管理庁) — affixed to passport
nameEn: J-Skip (Special Highly Skilled Professional) Certificate — copy
nameJa: 特別高度人材証明書の写し
noteEn: This is the certificate affixed to your passport when you were recognized as a Special Highly Skilled Professional (特別高度人材) by the Immigration Services Agency.
noteJa: 「特別高度人材」に該当することの確認を受けた際に旅券に添付されるものです。
